benchmarks.name: Simply supported beam with uniform distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form Euler-Bernoulli simply supported beam: RA=RB=qL/2, Mmax=qL^2/8, v_mid=5qL^4/(384EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates UDL equivalent nodal loads, reactions, internal force extrema and nodal midspan displacement.

benchmarks.name: Simply supported beam with point load at midspan
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form Euler-Bernoulli simply supported beam with centered point load: RA=RB=P/2, Mmax=PL/4, v_mid=PL^3/(48EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates nodal point load, symmetry, reactions and displacement.

benchmarks.name: Cantilever with tip point load
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form cantilever with tip point load: RA=P, MA=PL, v_tip=PL^3/(3EI), theta_tip=PL^2/(2EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates fixed support reaction/moment, tip displacement and rotation.

benchmarks.name: Cantilever with uniform distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form cantilever with UDL: RA=qL, MA=qL^2/2, v_tip=qL^4/(8EI), theta_tip=qL^3/(6EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates UDL on cantilever, fixed-end actions and tip deformation.

benchmarks.name: Symmetric triangular truss
benchmarks.reference: Method of joints for symmetric triangular truss: RAy=RBy=P/2, diagonal force=-(P/2)/sin(theta), tie force=(P/2)cot(theta).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates Truss2D axial force sign convention and symmetric vertical equilibrium.

benchmarks.name: Portal frame with symmetric gravity load

checks: symmetry: horizontal reactions equal and opposite

benchmarks.reference: Symmetry and global equilibrium of a fixed-base single-bay portal under symmetric vertical beam load.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates frame stability, vertical equilibrium and symmetric reaction behavior.

benchmarks.name: Inclined cantilever with LocalY uniform load
benchmarks.reference: 3-4-5 inclined cantilever. LocalY UDL is projected through local y=(-sin(theta),cos(theta)); resultant acts at member midpoint.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates local-to-global load projection for inclined Frame2D members.

benchmarks.name: Inclined cantilever with GlobalY uniform load
benchmarks.reference: 3-4-5 inclined cantilever. GlobalY UDL remains vertical regardless of member orientation; resultant acts at member midpoint.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates global load direction independence from member local axes.

benchmarks.name: Simply supported beam with eccentric nodal point load
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form Euler-Bernoulli simply supported beam with point load at x=a: RA=P(L-a)/L, RB=Pa/L, Mmax=Pab/L, v_load=P a^2 b^2/(3EIL).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates unsymmetric reactions, point-load bending maximum and displacement at a non-midspan loaded node.

benchmarks.name: Simply supported beam with factored load combination
benchmarks.reference: Manual combination ULS1=1.35G+1.50Q gives qd=19.5 kN/m; then RA=RB=qdL/2, Mmax=qdL^2/8, v_mid=5qdL^4/(384EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates load-combination arithmetic in the numerical analyzer, not only in the viewer.

benchmarks.name: Horizontal truss bar axial tension
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form axial bar: N=P and u=PL/(EA).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates Truss2D axial stiffness, tension sign convention and that truss-only sections do not require bending inertia.

benchmarks.name: Continuous two-span beam with uniform distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Classical equal two-span continuous beam with UDL on both spans: RA=RC=3qL/8, RB=5qL/4, M_support=qL^2/8.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates an indeterminate continuous beam, moment continuity at the internal support and non-equal support reactions.

benchmarks.name: Cantilever frame member with axial tip force
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form axial deformation of a prismatic bar: u=PL/(EA).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates Frame2D axial stiffness independently from flexural behavior.

benchmarks.name: Cantilever triangular truss with horizontal top load
benchmarks.reference: Method of joints on a 3-4-5 triangular determinate truss under horizontal top load: AC=+25 kN, BC=-15 kN, AB=0 kN.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates unsymmetric truss reactions, uplift at the pinned support and zero-force member behavior.

benchmarks.name: Two-storey braced mixed frame validator
benchmarks.reference: Global equilibrium of a mixed Frame2D + Truss2D braced two-storey frame: applied loads are Fx=+25 kN and Fy=-50 kN.
benchmarks.purpose: Regression validator for larger mixed models, inactive rotational DOF handling on truss members, finite response and load equilibrium.

benchmarks.name: Propped cantilever with uniform distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Classical propped cantilever with UDL: RB=3qL/8, RA=5qL/8, MA=qL^2/8, theta_B=qL^3/(48EI).
benchmarks.purpose: Validates force-method indeterminacy, fixed-plus-roller constraints, fixed-end moment sign and the compatibility condition v_B=0.

benchmarks.name: Fixed-fixed beam with uniform distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Classical fixed-fixed beam with UDL: RA=RB=qL/2 and fixed-end moment magnitude qL^2/12. Member end-force signs follow the local element convention used by the solver.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates rotational restraints at both ends, equal/opposite fixed-end moments and member end-force reporting.

benchmarks.name: Simply supported beam with triangular distributed load
benchmarks.reference: Closed-form statics for triangular load increasing from A to B: W=w0L/2, resultant at 2L/3 from A, RA=W/3=w0L/6, RB=2W/3=w0L/3.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates linearly varying distributed load equivalent nodal loads and asymmetric support reactions.

benchmarks.name: Moment-released simply supported beam with uniform load
benchmarks.reference: Simply supported beam with UDL and ideal end releases: RA=RB=qL/2, Mmax=qL^2/8, member end moments are zero.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates moment-release condensation, zero released end moments and preservation of simply supported bending response.

benchmarks.name: Fixed-base portal frame with lateral nodal load
benchmarks.reference: Independent direct-stiffness regression calculation for a one-bay fixed-base portal frame under a 24 kN top horizontal load. Global equilibrium gives ΣRx=-24 kN and ΣRy=0.
benchmarks.purpose: Validates frame sway, coupling between columns and beam, base shear distribution and finite displaced-shape response.
